goals.description: Finalize the scholarship essay draft and upload both required files to the portal before 18:00 on Thursday, ensuring the application is technically complete so no further explanation or panic is needed later.

By securing the submission now while cognitive reserves are still functional, I convert immediate friction into a concrete future payoff. Abandoning this task would force a larger, more stressful intervention tomorrow when my focus capacity peaks, violating my deliberate investment in the outcome.

This allows me to maintain surface-level stability while preserving energy for the high-value task.
